name: Scottish Oaten Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, mix together the flour, oats, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
3. In another bowl, whisk together the egg, vegetable oil, vanilla extract, and Coca-Cola until well combined.
4. Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
5. Fold in the chopped prunes and walnuts.
6. Grease a loaf pan with butter or cooking spray.
7. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and spread evenly.
8. Bake for 30-35 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
9. Remove from the oven and let cool in the pan for 10 minutes before turning off and transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
Prunes should be very well drained and coarsely chopped. You may substitute 1/2 cup of dried prunes.
